scripts.check: ./composer.phar run php-l && concurrently -g --timings npm:lint npm:analysis npm:test:node npm:test:phpunit
scripts.clean: rm -rf test-results/ && rm -rf tmp/og/ && find tmp/ -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name '*.html' -o -name '*.json' \) -delete && find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.html' -delete
scripts.generate:reports:fonts_urls: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/report-generation/generate_report.php fonts_urls > data/reports/test_fonts_url.txt
scripts.generate:reports:html_escape_and_link_ur: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/report-generation/generate_report.php html_escape_and_link_urls > data/reports/test_html_escape_and_link_urls.txt

docker compose exec -T web php scripts/report-generation/generate_report.php paremiotipus_repetits 12000 28000 > data/reports/test_tmp_repetits_2.txt

docker compose exec -T web php scripts/report-generation/generate_report.php paremiotipus_repetits 50000 > data/reports/test_tmp_repetits_4.txt
scripts.lint:docker: if command -v hadolint >/dev/null 2>&1; then hadolint .docker/*Dockerfile; else echo 'hadolint not found, skipping docker linting' >&2; exit 0; fi
scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:phpunit && npm run test:e2e && npm run validate:pages && npm run validate:lighthouse && npm run validate:ssl-expiration
